name: python_async_conversion_refactor
description: Test detection of comprehensive async conversion refactoring
new_code:
import asyncio
import aiohttp

class DataFetcher:
    async def fetch_user(self, session, user_id):
        async with session.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}") as response:
            return await response.json()
    
    async def process_users(self, user_ids):
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            tasks = [self.fetch_user(session, user_id) for user_id in user_ids]
            results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
            return results

expected_changes.description: Imports changed from requests to aiohttp and asyncio
Methods converted from sync to async
Added session parameter to fetch_user method
Sequential loop converted to concurrent tasks with asyncio.gather
Added async context managers for session handling
